title: lithophragma heterophyllum var. bolanderi
intro: Lithophragma heterophyllum var. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's lilybell or Bolander's prairie cup, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lithophragma heterophyllum var. bolanderi include its potential to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
